title: Signal Processing Path
description: Build fluency in Signal Processing inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM)
steps.summary: Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM) belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Signal Processing. Start after FastSAM and FastSAM-L.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fast-SCNN-Xception

steps.title: FastSAM
steps.summary: FastSAM belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Signal Processing. Compare it with FastSAM-L and Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM). It opens into Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: FastSAM-L
steps.summary: FastSAM-L belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Signal Processing. Compare it with FastSAM and Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM). It opens into Fast Segment Anything (FastSAM).
